title: Seasonal pesticide concentrations: Red River 2011 - Canada.ca
content:
## Seasonal pesticide concentrations: Red River 2011
This table gives median monthly concentrations of clopyralid, dicamba, MCPA, MCPP, 2,4-D and metolachlor (column headings) for 2011 (row headings).

Dicamba Median Concentrations (ng/L)
